hero.title: Audit
hero.subtitle: Complete agronomic diagnostics — current status, yield gap, and prioritized intervention plan.

includes.title: What's Included
items: Assessment of greenhouse structure, climate system, and irrigation infrastructure
Fertilizer and irrigation regime audit (EC/pH, drainage, Na/Cl accumulation)
Prioritized solution list and yield forecast

result.title: Deliverable
result.text: Written audit report + on-site discussion session.

inquiry.title: Tailored to your site
inquiry.text: We prepare an individual quote based on your area, season stage, and goals.
